headline: How FDA Approval of TECVAYLI and DARZALEX FASPRO Combo At Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In early March 2026, Johnson & Johnson received U.S. FDA approval for TECVAYLI (teclistamab-cqyv) plus DARZALEX FASPRO (daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj) to treat adults with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma after at least one prior therapy, based on Phase 3 MajesTEC-3 data showing improved progression-free and overall survival versus standard regimens. This combination introduces an immune-engaging approach that may shift treatment patterns as early as the second line for patients...

This combination introduces an immune-engaging approach that may shift treatment patterns as early as the second line for patients...

headline: JNJ Gets EU Nod for Expanded Use of Akeega in Prostate Cancer
summary: J&J gains EU approval to expand Akeega use to treat patients with BRCA-mutated metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer.

headline: FDA Expands Use Of Generic Drug To Treat Autism-Linked Genetic Disorder
summary: FDA approves expanded use of Wellcovorin tablets to treat cerebral folate deficiency linked to the FOLR1 gene in adults and children.

headline: Blackstone Balances Life Sciences Bet And REIT Interest As Valuation Lags
summary: Blackstone Life Sciences and Johnson & Johnson have agreed to co fund clinical trials of bleximenib, an investigational menin inhibitor for acute myeloid leukemia, marking their first joint research funding effort. Separately, Blackstone is reported to be exploring an acquisition of Whitestone REIT, which has engaged advisors and received confidentiality agreements from interested private equity firms. These moves arrive at a time when Blackstone, NYSE:BX, is drawing attention for activity...
